zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida von Northeim於大約1065年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯時，她的父親Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern51歲，母親Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim41歲。她於1097年與Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1100年在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯梅斯享年37歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 明登明登梅斯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Northeim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads named from nord ‘north’ + heim ‘home, farmstead’.

variants.name: Nordrum
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of the five farms in eastern Norway, named in Old Norse as Northrheimr (see Nordheim ).

variants.name: Norheim
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nels, Oddvar.
Norwegian: either a variant of Nordheim or from a farm name composed of Old Norse nór ‘narrows’ (see Nohr 1) + heimr ‘homestead, farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida von Northeim was born about 1065, in Kreis Meißen, Saxony, Germany, her father, Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern, was 51 and her mother, Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim, was 41. She married Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark in 1097, in Meißen, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1100, in Meißen, Meißen, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 37, and was buried in Meißen, Minden, Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida von Northeim est née environ 1065, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark en 1097, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1100, à Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Meißen, Minden, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida von Northeim um 1065 in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern 51 und ihre Mutter Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim 41. Sie hat 1097 in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1100 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Meißen, Minden, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Northeim è nata il circa 1065 nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark nel 1097, nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1100, nel Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Meißen, Minden, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Ida von Northeim(이)가 대략 1065년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1097년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1100년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss 이ss에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 민든 민든 이ss에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Northeim nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark em 1097, em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1100, em Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Meißen, Minden, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Bursfelde, Hannoversch-Münden, Göttingen: бурсфелд, ханновирщ-мuнден, ландкрис гoттинген, ниедирсачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida von Northeim родилась около 1065 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark в 1097 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1100 г. в местности миssен, крис миssен, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности миssен, минден, крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida von Northeim nació aproximadamente 1065, en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Otto I. von Northeim Herzog von Bayern, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Richenza Gräfin von Werl-Northeim, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Dedi II Markgraf von der sächsischen Ostmark en 1097, en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1100, en Meißen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Meißen, Minden, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemania.
